1) low-temperature smouldering pathway emission mode with transport fuel demand dominated output and sub-daily high-frequency sampling class
2) steady-state combustion continuum with flaring suppression and combined heat-power integrated consumption with sub-daily high-frequency sampling class

Question:

Restrict the calculation to:

1) elevated post-disturbance exudate flux with woody debris input and inverse capillary upwelling gradient
2) seasonal peak exudate flux with upstream leaf-litter input
